scope: Add `sworn render <release>`, a pure deterministic renderer that generates index.md from board.json plus each slice's spec.json/status.json, so the board's human view is never hand-authored and cannot drift from the record.

reachability.evidence: Built binary and ran `sworn render 2026-06-30-sworn-operational-readiness <worktree>` (exit 0) → regenerated docs/release/2026-06-30-sworn-operational-readiness/index.md, replacing the hand-authored file (AC-05). The rendered tracks table contains T1-operational-unblock and T2-board-render (all 5 tracks); the touchpoint matrix has 31 file rows with 0 collisions (no file marked under two tracks — the disjointness the matrix exists to prove); frontmatter scalars are single-quoted (AC-03). Re-running render produced a byte-identical index.md (idempotent, AC-02).

delivered.item: AC-01: `sworn render <release>` reads board.json + each slice's spec.json/status.json and writes index.md with a tracks table, slice table, touchpoint matrix, and dependency graph.
delivered.evidence: cmd/sworn/render.go (cmdRender + init self-registration); internal/board/render.go (Render/RenderToFile + section writers); golden internal/board/testdata/render/rel-fixture.golden.md

delivered.item: AC-02: deterministic + idempotent — same inputs render byte-identical (tracks sorted by id, slices in declared order, matrix rows sorted by (owning-track,path)).
delivered.evidence: TestRenderGolden (renders twice, asserts equal + matches golden) in internal/board/render_test.go; live idempotency re-run on the real release

delivered.item: AC-03: frontmatter emitted with single-quoted YAML scalars and passes ValidateIndex.
AC-04: fail closed — missing board.json (os.Stat guard, no lazy-migration fallthrough), bare-string/malformed board, or a missing slice record all error with no partial index.md written.
delivered.evidence: Render os.Stat guard + strict ReadBoard (render.go); TestRenderFailsClosedMissingBoard / TestRenderFailsClosedStringBoard / TestRenderFailsClosedMissingSliceRecord (render_test.go)

delivered.item: AC-05 (reachability): rendered output replaces the hand-authored index.md; tracks table has T1+T2, matrix is disjoint (0 collisions over 31 files).
AC-06: go build ./... and go test ./internal/board/... pass (plus ./cmd/sworn/... and full ./... with timeout per review Pin 3).
Rule 9: Type-1 design decision (strict board.ReadBoard over the rejected local tolerant decoder) recorded; deterministic designfit gate PASS.

not_delivered.item: Lint drift-guard that fails when the committed index.md differs from a fresh render.
not_delivered.why: Explicitly out of scope in spec.json rationale (follow-up).
not_delivered.acknowledgement: Scoped out by the planner in spec.json and confirmed in review.md Pin 6; surfaced here as a Rule 2 deferral.

not_delivered.item: Updating the planner skill/prompt to call `sworn render` instead of hand-writing index.md.
not_delivered.why: Private-harness change, explicitly out of scope in spec.json.
not_delivered.tracking: spec.json 'Out of scope'; follow-up harness task
not_delivered.acknowledgement: Named as out of scope by the planner; the renderer is the reusable engine the harness will call.

not_delivered.why: This session has no SWORN_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, so the model judge cannot run; deterministic gates (designfit PASS, build+tests green) stand in as the first pass.
not_delivered.tracking: Rule 7 adversarial verification is the fresh /verify-slice session's job and owns the model-backed run.
not_delivered.acknowledgement: Surfaced in this proof and the session handoff; not a silent skip.

divergence.item: The rendered index.md includes a top-level `# Release board: <release>` heading and a one-line 'generated by sworn render' provenance note above the four required sections.
divergence.reason: Presentation chrome matching the prior hand-authored index.md's title; additive to AC-01's required four sections (tracks table, slice table, touchpoint matrix, dependency graph), which are all present. No functional deviation.
